Defines attribute macros for unused, used, noreturn, and noinline in C.

# Purpose
This code is a simple C header file that defines a set of preprocessor macros for function attributes. It includes standard headers such as `stdint.h`, `stdbool.h`, and `stddef.h` to provide standard integer types, boolean type, and size definitions. The macros `__attr_unused___`, `__attr_used___`, `__attr_noreturn___`, and `__attr_noinline___` are defined to map to GCC-specific attributes, which control compiler behavior regarding function usage, return behavior, and inlining. The header file uses include guards (`#ifndef DEFS_H`, `#define DEFS_H`, `#endif`) to prevent multiple inclusions of the file in a single compilation unit.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
- `stdbool.h`
- `stddef.h`
